scripts.dev: concurrently -n web,realtime,prisma -c blue,magenta,green "pnpm --filter @groupspeak/web dev" "pnpm --filter @groupspeak/realtime dev" "pnpm --filter @groupspeak/db studio"
scripts.build: pnpm --filter @groupspeak/db generate && pnpm --filter @groupspeak/web build && pnpm --filter @groupspeak/realtime build
